string 2: You made it. Please, come on in.
You're here.
Oh, you seem to be facing quite the hardships lately.
Well, it looks like it's finally come to this, at last.

The area around the Akashic Records is a complex place where
time and space collide, after all.
{next}...The natural order of this world has begun to break down?
{next}Are you the ones behind all this?
{next}Can't you do something about it?
Yes, I suppose so. It's all rather troublesome, yes?

What makes you think that? We'd never trouble ourselves in
such a manner.

I wouldn't even if I could. I'd only get in trouble. I have a role 
to play. That's all.

In any case. it seems you've had some difficulties, so we've
decided to grant you a favor.

We've made it so you can go to any time and place that
you've visited before.

You're now free to travel between any time and place you've
set foot in. Isn't that wonderful?

As they say, seeing is believing. It's perfectly safe, so go
ahead. Give it a try.
{next}I can tend to unfinished business now.
{next}There are places I wanna see again.
{next}This can be my escape from reality.

Go forth and finish whatever troublesome tasks you've left
incomplete to this point.

I'd like to see them myself if it weren't such a hassle. But
you should go ahead.

Yes, reality can be difficult. It's good to take some time
away... within reason.

You don't want to have any regrets. There's a lot depending
on you, after all.

Do what you must so as not to have any regrets, and prepare
for the final battle.
Now, then. I leave it to you.

As per the hosts' orders, you can now travel to eras and
areas you've already visited.

You should be able to do so once you exit this theater. I
recommend you test it out.
